title: Oru Soora Kaaththu Lyrics Power Paandi
stanzas: <div>Oru Soora Kaaththu Song Lyrics Power Paandi

Oru soora kaaththu
oora paaththu poguthu.
manasellaam pooththu
vaanam paaththu yaerudhu

Oru soora kaaththu
oora paaththu poguthu.
manasellaam pooththu
vaanam paaththu yaerudhu

pala kuyilu koovudhu
oru mayilu aaduthu
oru vaanavillu
thaedi vandhu
powder poosuthu..

oru kadhavu thorakkuthu
pudhu vazhigal porakkudhu
vayasaana singam
jeans pottu dance aaduthu

ada naadi thudikkudhu
pudhu vegam porakkudhu
ada palaiya raththam
paththi eriyudhu
kodhikkuthu.

Oru soora kaaththu
oora paaththu poguthu.
manasellaam pooththu
vaanam paaththu yaerudhu

Oor ulagam
kaaladiyilthaan adanguthu.
paer sollida
poar muzhakkam thaan
muzhanguthu.

ini baarangal ellaam
en baaram thaangum.
nana podum
thaazhathuk ellaam aadum.

idhuthaanda sorgam
adhu ippo en pakkam.
naan pona pinnal
en paer nikkum

andha STARum naanda
andha SUNum naandaa
andha SUNoda vinnum naandaa
odhungudaa

Oru soora kaaththu
kaaththu kaaththu
enna paaththu
soora kaaththu

Oru soora kaaththu

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Oru Soora Kaaththu, Dhanush delivers a lively performance that reflects the carefree spirit of the protagonist in Power Paandi. The song captures the essence of joy and celebration, encouraging listeners to embrace life with enthusiasm. It conveys a message of positivity and the beauty of living in the moment. The upbeat tempo and catchy lyrics evoke feelings of happiness and energy, making it a perfect anthem for celebrations.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Oru Soora Kaaththu from Power Paandi is a vibrant celebration of life and energy, perfectly encapsulated by Dhanush's dynamic vocals. The collaboration with music director Sean Roldan brings a fresh and lively beat that will make you want to dance. This song is not just a melody; it's an experience that resonates with joy and enthusiasm.
stanzaMeanings: A strong wind is blowing through the town. All the hearts are blooming, and the sky is rising.
A strong wind is blowing through the town. All the hearts are blooming, and the sky is rising.
Many birds are singing, a peacock is dancing, and a rainbow has come, spreading its colors.
A new door is opening, new paths are emerging, and an old lion is dancing in jeans.
Oh, my heart is racing, new speed is coming, and the old blood is boiling with anger.
A strong wind is blowing through the town. All the hearts are blooming, and the sky is rising.
The world is settling down on the ground. When names are called, the noise is loud.
The crows and clouds are flying below, and in the sunlight, my face is visible.
Now all the burdens will be lifted. Everything under the sky will dance.
This is heaven, and now it is near me. After I leave, my name will remain.
That star is mine, that sun is mine, and that sun's sky is also mine, it is shining.
A strong wind is blowing, blowing, blowing, what a sight, a strong wind.
A strong wind is blowing through the town. All the hearts are blooming, and the sky is rising.
Many birds are singing, a peacock is dancing, and a rainbow has come, spreading its colors.
A new door is opening, new paths are emerging, and an old lion is dancing in jeans.
Oh, my heart is racing, new speed is coming, and the old blood is boiling with anger.
